creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 214563
libhandy-0.0.13.diff

Amended:
 * Bumped DISTVERSION to 0.0.13 and updated distinfo.
 * Updated pkg-plist with latest files.
 * Removed 'files/patch-src_gen-public-types.sh' as addressed
   upstream [1].

[1] https://source.puri.sm/Librem5/libhandy/-/commit/e1c500dd02b14285e69544ad4384d8ed6e1c5109

Changelog:
 * https://source.puri.sm/Librem5/libhandy/-/tags/v0.0.13

Tested:
 * portlint: OK (looks fine).
 * testport: OK (poudriere: 3.3.4).
 * Since the only consumer of libhandy is net-im/fractal, I've
   attached a Poudriere build log showing successful compilation
   of the application and works as expected. Presumably it's
   PORTREVISION will need to be bumped as a result?
